TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kayu-baliq, title = Kayu-baliq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kayu-baliq} }

S.FORM: Kayu-baliq Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Kayu-baliq a niyaro', 150 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 359 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 2% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 98% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 351 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 1.4%, Amis 0.3%, Puyuma 0.3%, roma 0.3%.
S.PHON: kajo~u~u-b~b~va…ĺi* itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u kajo~u~u-b~b~va…ĺi* a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, * ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ *.*%, amis *.*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *.*%, ro~uma *.*%.
S.FORM: Kayu-baliq Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Kayu-baliq a niyaro', 150 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 359 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 2% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 8 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 98% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 351 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 1.4%, Amis 0.3%, Puyuma 0.3%, roma 0.3%.
